reviews.comment:
Siempre voy : excelente atención. Muy conforme. Es un lugar muy amplio con un predio al lado para socios del a.c.a. con parrilla,bachas para lavar ,arbolera

(Translated by Google)
I always go: excellent service. Very satisfied. It's a very spacious place with an adjacent area for ACA members, complete with a grill, sinks, and a tree-lined patio.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtLVlEekp3EAE

reviews.comment:
Voy seguido,muy buena atención y rapidez. Es muy amplio : para inflar los neumáticos,al lado lugar exclusivo para socios del a.c.a. muy amplio con árboles ,parrillas ,para pasar el dia

(Translated by Google)
I go there often; the service is excellent and fast. It's very spacious: there's a tire inflation area, and next door there's a large, exclusive area for ACA members with trees and grills—perfect for spending the day.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoOUlldVpREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, tenés descuento a socios del ACA y se puede pagar con APP YPF con dinero en cuenta o tarjeta.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, you get a discount for ACA members and you can pay with the YPF app using account balance or card.
